title: From Cutting Losses to Turning a Profit: The Pitfalls I’ve Fallen Into   I Hope You Avoid Them
author: kichebar
selftext:
I’ve just reached a milestone I’ve been dreaming of for years.



The journey was far from smooth sailing; in fact, it was filled with bumps and setbacks.



At times, I felt unstoppable… but I’ve also experienced the agony of losing months of gains in just a few days. Sharp drawdowns, poor entry points, overconfidence, indecision    I’ve been through it all.



I’m not posting this to sell you anything, nor am I sugarcoating reality, and I certainly won’t pretend this was easy. The truth is, it wasn’t easy at all.



But if you’re struggling right now, working your hardest yet feeling like you’re not making any progress   believe me, I’ve been exactly where you are.



If you’re interested in any of the following topics:



How I develop my buy and sell strategies;

What key factors I focus on when looking for trading opportunities;

How I manage risk during periods of extreme market volatility;



Feel free to leave a comment or contact me directly. I’d be more than happy to share the strategies that have worked for me, as well as the lessons I’ve learned from my failures.



Most importantly: keep going.
